data.title: Curve Finance Achieves Record Trading Volume in Early 2025
data.description: According to PANews, decentralized lending protocol and exchange Curve Finance reported a record trading volume of nearly $35 billion in the first quarter of 2025. This marks an increase of over 13% compared to the first quarter of 2024. The surge in trading volume is attributed to a significant rise in the number of transactions, which grew from approximately 1.8 million in the first quarter of 2024 to about 5.5 million in the same period of 2025. This robust growth occurred despite an overall decline in the cryptocurrency market. Data from CoinGecko indicates that the total market capitalization of cryptocurrencies has fallen by more than 20% since the beginning of the year, as of March 31.

data.title: U.S. Treasury Yields Experience Decline
data.description: According to BlockBeats, the yields on U.S. 10-year and 2-year Treasury futures fell by 10 basis points, reaching 4.06% and 3.798%, respectively.

data.title: The yields on U.S. 10-year and 2-year Treasury futures fell 10 basis points to 4.06% and 3.798% respectively.
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: On April 3, the yields of the US 10-year and 2-year Treasury futures fell by 10 basis points to 4.06% and 3.798% respectively. (Jinshi)

data.title: US Futures Fall, $2 Trillion Erased as Tariff Shock Hits Stocks, Bitcoin
data.description:
Sweeping tariffs from Trump sent U. S. futures and Bitcoin lower, as investors fled risk amid fears of rising inflation and slowing growth.
source: https://decrypt.co/313038/us-futures-fall-2-trillion-erased-tariff-shock-stocks-bitcoin

data.title: Grayscale ETHE Experiences Significant Outflow
data.description: According to BlockBeats, recent monitoring by Farside revealed that Grayscale's Ethereum Trust (ETHE) experienced a net outflow of $31.1 million. This development marks a significant movement in the cryptocurrency market, reflecting investor sentiment and market dynamics.

data.title: $518,000,000 in Bitcoin and Crypto Liquidated As Trump’s Tariffs Rock Global Markets
data.description:
Crypto assets are witnessing a fresh wave of liquidations as President Trump’s new tariffs rock global markets. Trump new blanket tariffs target a long list of nations and go further than many analysts expected, sparking widespread economic uncertainty and volatility in both traditional and digital asset markets.
source: https://dailyhodl.com/2025/04/02/518000000-in-bitcoin-and-crypto-liquidated-as-trumps-tariffs-rock-global-markets/

data.title: The whale deposited $5 million USDC into HyperLiquid to increase its HYPE holdings, with a total floating loss of $1.3 million
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to Onchain Lens monitoring, 7 hours ago, a whale deposited $5 million USDC to HyperLiquid to increase its holdings of $HYPE. Currently, the address holds a total of 700,214 $HYPE, with a market value of approximately $8.43 million and a floating loss of approximately $1.3 million. In addition, the whale placed an order to sell 170,234 $HYPE at a price of $16.

data.title: Canada to Implement Countermeasures Against U.S. Tariffs
data.description: According to Odaily, Canadian Prime Minister Carney announced on the afternoon of the 2nd that Canada will implement countermeasures in response to U.S. tariffs. The Canadian federal government is expected to reveal specific measures on the 3rd. Earlier that day, U.S. President Donald Trump signed an executive order at the White House regarding so-called 'reciprocal tariffs,' declaring a 10% 'minimum benchmark tariff' on trade partners, with higher tariffs imposed on certain partners.

data.title: U.S. Treasury Secretary Attributes Stock Sell-Off to Tech Stocks Decline
data.description:
According to BlockBeats, U.S. Treasury Secretary Besant stated on Wednesday evening that the recent stock market sell-off is primarily due to a significant pullback in major technology stocks, rather than the protectionist policies of U.S. President Donald Trump's administration.

In a television interview, Besant emphasized, "I am striving to be the Treasury Secretary, not a market commentator. I want to highlight that the Nasdaq index peaked on DeepSeek Day, indicating this is an issue with the Mag7 (the seven major U.S. tech giants), not a MAGA issue."

data.title: Arizona House Committee Passes Bitcoin Reserve Bill
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: The Arizona House of Representatives has passed two Bitcoin reserve-related bills (SB 1025 and SB 1373) in full committee. The next step will be the third reading, followed by a final vote in the House of Representatives. If successfully passed, the two bills will be submitted to the governor for signature to become formal laws.
